zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal於大約1250年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親Gilbert Talbot36歲，母親Gwenlyn Mechyll25歲。他於1269年1月7日與Sarah de Beauchamp在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1306年9月3日享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal was born about 1250, in Herefordshire, England, his father, Gilbert Talbot, was 36 and his mother, Gwenlyn Mechyll, was 25. He married Sarah de Beauchamp on 7 January 1269, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 September 1306, at the age of 57.

Il a épousé Sarah de Beauchamp le 7 janvier 1269, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1306, à l’âge de 57 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswalが約1250年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert Talbotは36歳，母Gwenlyn Mechyllは25歳であった。1269年1月7日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルでSarah de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1306年9月3日に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Talbot(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenlyn Mechyll(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1269년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 Sarah de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1306년 9월 3일 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Talbot Lord of Eccleswal родился около 1250 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Talbot было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenlyn Mechyll, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah de Beauchamp 7 января 1269 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 сентября 1306 г. в возрасте 57 лет.
